name: DvHive
review_text: fiona was very helpful! she gave me a diminished value report that increased my payout by 2400$! thank you DVHIVE!!

name: DvHive
review_text:
The hive was professional from start to finish. The insurance company was trying to lowball me, but DV came in handy when I knew MY VEHICLE WAS WORTH MORE.

The only way they would increase my payout is if I provided an appraisal. DVHive provided just that. They were so attentive, especially Fionah who helped me throughout this 3 week back and forth. Thank You!

name: DvHive
review_text: I had no idea what diminished value was until DVHIVE explained it to me. After my car accident in Florida the insurance company paid for repairs but ignored the loss in value. DVHIVE handled the diminished value appraisal and their report helped me get thousands of dollars more. I highly recommend them for any diminished value claim.

name: DvHive
review_text: Had a great experience handling a total loss. The initial payout overlooked some of my truck’s options, but DVHIVE reviewed the build details, documented everything thoroughly, and helped secure a much better settlement.

name: DvHive
review_text: Insurance lowballed me after a major accident. DVHIVE delivered a detailed appraisal that actually held weight and helped me recover the diminished value I was owed. Fast communication, clear process, great team.

name: DvHive
review_text: I had a lowball offer from State Farm that was simply insulting for a luxury vehicle. After thorough research, I decided to go to DVHIVE for a total loss appraisal and the results were far more than i was looking for to begin with. I would recommend using this team 100%.

name: DvHive
review_text: I am very impressed with the work Fiona did at DVHIVE! After the insurance company gave me a low ball offer that came out at $1000, DVHIVE was able to negotiate at $5300 settlement! Well worth the investment!

name: DvHive
review_text: DVHIVE is incredible. They guided me step by step through the settlement process making sure I had the right paperwork, key info, and useful references. We reached a fair settlement, and I’m so glad I trusted them. Thank you, DVHIVE! Highly recommended.

name: DvHive
review_text: DVHIVE was a life saver. They handled my diminished value appraisal quickly, dealt with the insurance company, and got me $2.8k. I highly recommend them for vehicle appraisals and total loss appraisals.

name: DvHive
review_text: All I can say that this is solid service, from day 1 with the consulting, giving me security about my claim and agreeing with me that I am being lowballed. They provided me an appraisal and they negotiated for me  throughout the whole process, I did not have to lift a finger. At the end I got around $7,300 more for my car which made this totally worth it! Highly recommend!

name: DvHive
review_text: The customer service and effectiveness of DVHIVE is absolutely exceptional. Communication was simple and easy. Their responses were always prompt and helpful. And most importantly, DVHIVE was able to negotiate a value for our totaled vehicle that was around $4,500 higher than the value initially quoted us by our insurance company.

name: DvHive
review_text: After my brother in laws 04 Honda Accord was rear ended, I almost skipped the diminished value claim. I reached out to DVHIVE from a friend's recommendation and I’m so glad I did. They handled everything and got me the compensation I should’ve received from the start. Highly recommend!

name: DvHive
review_text: After a delivery van clipped my parked 2024 Hyundai IONIQ 5, the repairs were covered but my diminished value claim was dismissed as ‘not applicable.’ Fiona reviewed my file, built a clear appraisal and presented it to the adjuster. The settlement moved quickly to $4,300 without me arguing on the phone. Highly recommend!

name: DvHive
review_text: My insurance tried to lowball me like always and they got me my money. If you’re getting a quote from insurance it’s definitely worth checking with them.

name: DvHive
review_text: Despite having trouble with my phone refusing to send pdf copies of car repair invoices, DVHive stuck it out and negotiated a fair appraisal value I never would imagined I could get!

name: DvHive
review_text:
DVHIVE provided exceptional service! The communication was clear and professional throughout the entire process, and they truly made the diminished value claim easy to understand and navigate. Their appraisal report was thorough and well-documented, which gave me confidence when dealing with the insurance company.

The only reason for 4 stars instead of 5 is that I was hoping to recover the full $7,500 we initially aimed for, but the insurance company settled for $6,800 instead. While I understand that's beyond DVHIVE's control, it was a bit short of expectations.

Overall, I highly recommend DVHIVE for anyone needing a diminished value appraisal. They’re knowledgeable, responsive, and effective at what they do!

name: DvHive
review_text: I was initially skeptical about DVHIVE, bcs I was not sure how the process worked, and it seemed a bit too good to be true.  However, they quickly proved me wrong.  The team was professional, thorough, and incredibly knowledgeable about diminished value claims.  They guided me through every step, prepared a solid appraisal report, and ensured I received the full amount I was entitled to.  What started as doubt turned into a genuine appreciation - DVHIVE truly delivers on their promises.

name: DvHive
review_text: Top service. Highly Recommended!

name: DvHive
review_text: Fiona was amazing! The claim process went by smoothly and Fiona managed to help me throughout the whole thing!

name: DvHive
review_text: DVHIVE’s team was incredibly professional throughout the entire process. They patiently answered all my questions and made sure I understood every step, which I really appreciated. I was also reassured by their money-back guarantee in case the insurance company refused to pay my diminished value—though I didn’t need it because they helped me secure $2,765! The only downside was how long the insurance company took to pay out, but that wasn’t DVHIVE’s fault. Their expertise and excellent customer service made a frustrating process so much easier. Highly recommend!

name: DvHive
review_text: At first, I hesitated to use DVHIVE because of the price—it seemed like a big investment, and I wasn’t sure it would pay off. Looking back now, it was one of the best decisions I’ve made. Thanks to their expertise and the detailed appraisal report they provided, I received a settlement from the at-fault insurance company that was 12 times what I paid for their services! Their team was professional, supportive, and made the whole process so much easier. DVHIVE was worth every penny!

name: DvHive
review_text: I highly recommend working with this company if you are looking to get the best value for your vehicle. The team is very attentive, quick to respond to any questions you may have along the way, and I was overall very pleased with their services.

name: DvHive
review_text: DVHive was a huge help in getting me close to the true diminished value of my car after an accident. The insurance company was difficult to work with, but David was patient, professional, and persistent throughout the process. He made sure I got a fair settlement, and I highly recommend their services.

name: DvHive
review_text: Fiona was really respectful and understanding! Helped walk me through step by step! Great service, great price!

name: DvHive
review_text: I used DVHive for a diminished value claim after my car was in an accident. They made the process easy and professional, and within a few weeks, I got a check for $4,000 from the at-fault driver’s insurance. The whole experience was smooth, and I’d definitely recommend them if you're in a similar situation.

name: DvHive
review_text: I recently had the pleasure of working with DVHIVE for a diminished value claim, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with their service. From the beginning, their team was responsive and attentive, taking the time to explain every step of the process and answer my questions. They were incredibly knowledgeable and made the entire experience smooth and stress-free. Thanks to their expertise, I was able to secure a fair settlement quickly. I highly recommend DVHIVE for anyone needing professional support with a claim!

name: DvHive
review_text: They made a complicated process simple and stress-free, providing a thorough, professional assessment that helped me get a fair settlement. The team was responsive, knowledgeable, and genuinely helpful. Highly recommend!

name: DvHive
review_text: I’m from New York, and after being rear-ended in my 2019 GMC, I was unsure how to handle the diminished value claim with my insurance company. That’s when I found DVHIVE. David was incredibly helpful—he explained the process, assessed the damage, and worked directly with my insurer to make sure I got the maximum payout. Thanks to his expertise, I received much more than I initially expected. I highly recommend David and his team if you’re dealing with a similar situation!

name: DvHive
review_text: I initially thought pursuing a diminished value claim for my rear-ended Toyota wasn't worth the effort. However, after reaching out to DVHIVE for more information, I’m really glad I did. Their team was incredibly helpful and secured the compensation I deserved without the hassle I anticipated. I would definitely recommend them. Thanks again!

name: DvHive
review_text: I received some excellent service from DVHIVE. I hadn’t heard of diminished value until I started researching it after someone hit my brand new Tesla at an intersection. My SUV lost a lot of value, but thanks to DVHIVE, I got some money back. I really appreciate your team's help!

name: DvHive
review_text: if you’re working for responsible people, optimal and fast results, choose DvHive! Fiona is just amazing!

name: DvHive
review_text: I recently worked with a DvHive, and I couldn't be more pleased with their service. From the start, their team was incredibly attentive, taking the time to answer all my questions and guide me through the process. They followed up with multiple emails, ensuring I was informed every step of the way. Their diligence paid off—I received the highest diminished value possible for my vehicle. I highly recommend this company to anyone seeking assistance in recovering their losses. Their professionalism and commitment truly made a difference!

name: DvHive
review_text: Thank you so much for your support! The team at DvHive helped us navigate the process effortlessly, and we received a substantial amount from the insurance claim. We couldn’t have done it without their expertise and guidance. Highly recommend their services!

name: DvHive
review_text: I recently worked with DvHive for a diminished value claim after an accident, and I couldn't be happier. Their team was professional and knowledgeable, guiding me through the process with ease. They helped me secure the maximum compensation from my insurance company, providing a thorough appraisal and strong evidence for my claim. I highly recommend DvHive or anyone needing diminished value assistance!
